subparagraph.content: an employee of the Service who is exclusively assigned by the Service to perform duties at a field unit, and the members of the employee’s family; and

any other individual who is authorized to occupy Federal Government quarters under section 5911 of title 5, and for whom there is no feasible alternative to the provision of Federal Government housing, and the members of the individual’s family.

paragraph.heading: Primary resource values.—
paragraph.content: The term “primary resource values” means resources that are specifically mentioned in the enabling legislation for that field unit or other resource value recognized under Federal statute.

paragraph.heading: Quarters.—
paragraph.content: The term “quarters” means quarters owned or leased by the Federal Government.

paragraph.heading: Seasonal quarters.—
paragraph.content: The term “seasonal quarters” means quarters typically occupied by field employees who are hired on assignments of 6 months or less.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;
width:68.0pt ; max-width:68.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black;
width:94.0pt ; max-width:94.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-left:1px solid black;

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: The text of 16 U.S.C. 17o(19)(B) is omitted because the term “land management agency” is not used.
